description: Lock the corrected chronology and causal boundaries for the Industrial chronology queue and copperplate map engraving.

checks.reason: The factory-era urbanization process is anchored to the 1760s within the source-defined 1750-1850 period.
Railways postdate the factory-era urbanization process and are later accelerators rather than origin prerequisites.
Early industrial trade catalogs predate Hall's documented interchangeable-parts milestone.
Source-pinned chronology for interchangeable_parts must remain at 1822.

Print advertising agents predate the scoped modern department store.
The Singer installment milestone is tied to mass-produced durables, not department stores.
Securities trading is not part of the retail installment contract.
Printing is later diffusion context for the scoped manifestation.
Public education is later nation-building infrastructure.
Railways postdate the 1789 milestone.
Smoothbore muskets do not enable machine-produced rifling.
Hall production is pinned to precision machinery rather than Huntsman steel.
Rifling does not cause the breech-loading action.
Original corporate research is not downstream of factory inspection.
The first disk generator applied induction without requiring steam power.
Machine-tool scaling is not required by the first experimental disk.
NPL is not downstream of the same-year GE laboratory.
Calibration standards replace generic machine tools as the direct lineage.
The 1874 proving ground predates the 1900 NPL model.
The warehouse is a cold-chain component, not its descendant.
The scoped car uses insulation and ice-era cooling.
The car is a cold-chain component.
Factory safety is a parallel regulatory lineage.
Dining cars predate the graph cold-chain milestone.
Mail-order retail is absent from the dining-car lineage.
The first scoped arc weld joined lead.
Machine tools are not part of the first joining method.
Engraved maps precede compiled printed atlases.
Later machine-drawing conventions do not enable the 1478 maps.
Calibration is not part of the documented engraving method.
Mass-produced durables supplied the commercial setting for broad installment selling.
Hall production is documented through precision machinery rather than generic Huntsman steel.
Purpose-built precision machinery supplied the documented industrial production capability for Hall's breech-loading rifles.
Republican popular sovereignty is political lineage rather than a technical component.
Existing fertilizer demand is historical application context.
Electromagnetic induction supplies the operating principle.
Instrument verification extends calibration practice.
Renaissance printing supplied the repeatable paper-impression process for engraved copperplate maps.
Cartographic content is required on an engraved map plate.
